---
title: "Practice"
format: 
  html:
    page-layout: full
    link-external-newwindow: true
    toc: false
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(here)
source(here("class_dates.R"))
```

| Homework | Assignment | Data | Assignment due (\@11pm) | Answers | Solutions |
|----|----|----|----|----|----|
| 1 | [[{{< iconify material-symbols assignment size=29px >}}](/practice/practice_01.qmd)]{style="color:#f8f5f0;"} | [{{< iconify tdesign data-filled size=29px >}}]{style="color:#f8f5f0;"} | `r pract1 %>% format("%m/%d")` | [{{< iconify ph key-fill size=29px >}}]{style="color:#f8f5f0;"} | [{{< iconify mdi folder-key size=30px >}}]{style="color:#f8f5f0;"} |
| 2 | [[{{< iconify material-symbols assignment size=29px >}}](/homework/HW_02.qmd)]{style="color:#f8f5f0;"} | [{{< iconify tdesign data-filled size=29px >}}]{style="color:#f8f5f0;"} | `r pract2 %>% format("%m/%d")` | [{{< iconify ph key-fill size=29px >}}]{style="color:#f8f5f0;"} | [{{< iconify mdi folder-key size=30px >}}]{style="color:#f8f5f0;"} |
| 3 | [{{< iconify material-symbols assignment size=29px >}}]{style="color:#f8f5f0;"} | [{{< iconify tdesign data-filled size=29px >}}]{style="color:#f8f5f0;"} | `r pract3 %>% format("%m/%d")` | [{{< iconify ph key-fill size=29px >}}]{style="color:#f8f5f0;"} | [{{< iconify mdi folder-key size=30px >}}]{style="color:#f8f5f0;"} |
| 4 | [{{< iconify material-symbols assignment size=29px >}}]{style="color:#f8f5f0;"} | [{{< iconify tdesign data-filled size=29px >}}]{style="color:#f8f5f0;"} | `r pract4 %>% format("%m/%d")` | [{{< iconify ph key-fill size=29px >}}]{style="color:#f8f5f0;"} | [{{< iconify mdi folder-key size=30px >}}]{style="color:#f8f5f0;"} |
| 5 | [{{< iconify material-symbols assignment size=29px >}}]{style="color:#f8f5f0;"} | [{{< iconify tdesign data-filled size=29px >}}]{style="color:#f8f5f0;"} | `r pract5 %>% format("%m/%d")` | [{{< iconify ph key-fill size=29px >}}]{style="color:#f8f5f0;"} | [{{< iconify mdi folder-key size=30px >}}]{style="color:#f8f5f0;"} |
| 6 | [{{< iconify material-symbols assignment size=29px >}}]{style="color:#f8f5f0;"} | [{{< iconify tdesign data-filled size=29px >}}]{style="color:#f8f5f0;"} | `r pract6 %>% format("%m/%d")` | [{{< iconify ph key-fill size=29px >}}]{style="color:#f8f5f0;"} | [{{< iconify mdi folder-key size=30px >}}]{style="color:#f8f5f0;"} |
| 7 | [{{< iconify material-symbols assignment size=29px >}}]{style="color:#f8f5f0;"} | [{{< iconify tdesign data-filled size=29px >}}]{style="color:#f8f5f0;"} | `r pract7 %>% format("%m/%d")` | [{{< iconify ph key-fill size=29px >}}]{style="color:#f8f5f0;"} | [{{< iconify mdi folder-key size=30px >}}]{style="color:#f8f5f0;"} |
| 8 | [{{< iconify material-symbols assignment size=29px >}}]{style="color:#f8f5f0;"} | [{{< iconify tdesign data-filled size=29px >}}]{style="color:#f8f5f0;"} | `r pract8 %>% format("%m/%d")` | [{{< iconify ph key-fill size=29px >}}]{style="color:#f8f5f0;"} | [{{< iconify mdi folder-key size=30px >}}]{style="color:#f8f5f0;"} |
| 9 | [{{< iconify material-symbols assignment size=29px >}}]{style="color:#f8f5f0;"} | [{{< iconify tdesign data-filled size=29px >}}]{style="color:#f8f5f0;"} | `r pract9 %>% format("%m/%d")` | [{{< iconify ph key-fill size=29px >}}]{style="color:#f8f5f0;"} | [{{< iconify mdi folder-key size=30px >}}]{style="color:#f8f5f0;"} |

\*Please note that you need to download the `.html` file to see the LaTeX math properly.

## File Naming

- For Practice assignments, please use the following file naming: "Lastname_Firstinitial_HW0.qmd" and "Lastname_Firstinitial_HW0.html"

## Rubrics

|   | 1 point | 0 points |
|----|----|----|
| Completeness | 75% of the question parts are thoroughly worked out and have an answer. “Question parts” means the sub-questions labeled “Part \_." Answers can be incorrect or correct. For parts with longer processes and calculations, solution set up and calculations are required. | Less than 75% of question parts are thoroughly worked out. Attempts do not count as thoroughly worked out. |
